sections.paragraph: m. a covering of the head, a band to cover the head, for עֲפֵר, see the root אָפַר ; 1 Ki. 30:28 , 41 1Ki 20:41. LXX. τελαμών. Ch. and Abulwalid, by the help of their respective languages, use nearly the same word; the former מַעְפָּרָת, the latter مِغْفَرَةُ, i.e. a cap, a helmet. The same word is found in Syriac ܡܰܥܦܪܳܐ i.e. a mitre of a priest and bishops. Others take it as transp. for פְּאֵר ornament of the head.
